title: rubus russatus
intro: Rubus russatus, also known as the Russian Raspberry or Himalayan Raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. It is a perennial shrub native to the Himalayas and other parts of Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its high anthocyanin content, providing antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Rubus russatus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function, and it can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its medicinal benefits.
